prompt: Generate a flat lay display of branding materials for a GenAI startup. Use the dark blue and purple color palette and the minimalist, professional style from the reference image. Show items like a laptop sticker, a pen, and a small box.
searchQueryGenerated: Clean modern branding identity typography design layout
prompt_refined: Generate a flat lay display of branding materials for a GenAI startup, utilizing the dark blue and purple color palette and the minimalist, professional style from image 1. The branding elements (logo, text) on all items should feature a clean, bold, sans-serif typography, consistent with the 'WE CLEAN' branding seen in image 1. Include a rectangular laptop sticker, a sleek branded pen, and a small, branded packaging box. Arrange these items artfully on a light-colored, clean surface, presented from an overhead perspective with subtle, natural shadows that enhance depth, similar to the composition in image 1.
objects: dark blue and purple color palette
clean, bold, sans-serif typography on branding elements
branding elements (logo, text) on all items
